option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
#!/bin/bash # Usage examples for run_all_plots.sh with parallel execution
echo "============================================" echo "run_all_plots.sh - Parallel Execution Examples" echo "============================================" echo ""
echo "1. DEFAULT (Automatic Parallelization)" echo " Detects number of CPU cores and runs that many jobs in parallel" echo " $ ./scripts/run_all_plots.sh" echo ""
echo "2. SEQUENTIAL PROCESSING (No Parallelization)" echo " Run one dataset at a time (slowest but uses least resources)" echo " $ PARALLEL_JOBS=1 ./scripts/run_all_plots.sh" echo ""
echo "3. CUSTOM PARALLEL JOBS" echo " Run 2 datasets in parallel" echo " $ PARALLEL_JOBS=2 ./scripts/run_all_plots.sh" echo "" echo " Run 4 datasets in parallel" echo " $ PARALLEL_JOBS=4 ./scripts/run_all_plots.sh" echo ""
echo "4. DRY-RUN WITH PARALLEL (Preview without executing)" echo " $ DRY_RUN=true ./scripts/run_all_plots.sh" echo ""
echo "5. COMBINED: Dry-run + Sequential" echo " $ DRY_RUN=true PARALLEL_JOBS=1 ./scripts/run_all_plots.sh" echo ""
echo "============================================" echo "PERFORMANCE COMPARISON" echo "============================================" echo "" echo "With 7 datasets (3 small + 4 synthetic), ~5 min per dataset:" echo " Sequential (PARALLEL_JOBS=1): ~35 minutes" echo " Dual parallel (PARALLEL_JOBS=2): ~18 minutes (1.9x faster)" echo " Quad parallel (PARALLEL_JOBS=4): ~9 minutes (3.8x faster)" echo " Auto (CPU cores): ~9-12 minutes (system dependent)" echo ""
echo "============================================" echo "RECOMMENDATIONS" echo "============================================" echo "" echo "For standard laptops/servers (4-8 cores):" echo " $ PARALLEL_JOBS=4 ./scripts/run_all_plots.sh" echo "" echo "For high-core systems (16+ cores):" echo " $ PARALLEL_JOBS=8 ./scripts/run_all_plots.sh" echo "" echo "For fast development iteration:" echo " $ DRY_RUN=true ./scripts/run_all_plots.sh" echo "" echo "For maximum speed with FAST_MODE plotting:" echo " $ FAST_MODE=true PARALLEL_JOBS=4 ./scripts/run_all_plots.sh" echo " (Should complete in ~2-3 minutes)" echo ""

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
